nasb.text: First of all, then, I urge that entreaties and prayers, petitions and thanksgivings, be made on behalf of all men,

esv.text: First of all, then, I urge that supplications, prayers, intercessions, and thanksgivings be made for all people,

ccb.text: 我劝你首先要为所有的人恳求、祷告、代求，为他们感谢上帝。

csbs.text: 所以我劝你，首要的是为所有的人，为众君王和所有在上的献上祈求、祷告、代求和感谢，
